# google_compute_ha_controller

Get information about a Compute Engine HaController.



## Example Usage

```hcl
data "google_compute_ha_controller" "default" {
  name = google_compute_ha_controller.default.name
}
```

## Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:



* `name` -
  (Required)
  Name of the resource.
  The name must be 1-63 characters long, and comply with RFC1035.


* `region` -
  (Required)
  The region where the HA Controller will be created.

* `project` - (Optional) The ID of the project in which the resource belongs.
    If it is not provided, the provider project is used.


## Attributes Reference

See [google_compute_ha_controller](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/google/latest/docs/resources/compute_ha_controller#argument-reference) resource for details of the available attributes.
